description: Enhance your Sports performance with these stylish and useful wristbands from puma. Designed for comfort and style, it’s sure to extend that extra support to tennis and Basketball players, while those who love to ride the bike can add some zing to their outfit with this pair of wristbands. Made of 62% nylon, 26% silicon and 12% rubber for absolute durability, sweat protection, comfort and styleConveniently elasticated to sit snug around the wrists without causing irritationEmbossed branding on the upper for styleCareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
